name: cotidie
description: Cotidie's custom Codex skills: PR writing, iteration roadmaps, and UML class diagrams.

interface.shortDescription: Custom Codex workflows for PR writing, iteration roadmaps, and UML class diagrams.
interface.longDescription: Cotidie's Codex plugin bundles reusable workflow skills for drafting pull request text, planning vertical user-testable iterations, and creating or modifying UML class diagrams as draw.io files.
capabilities: Draft PR and MR titles and bodies
Create UML class diagrams as draw.io files
Modify existing UML class diagrams against code
